pi_items.source: GitHub - gcompris/GCompris-qt repository confirms leftright activity directory exists; Arch Linux package listing shows leftright.rcc resource file; first WebSearch result confirmed 'leftright' is the standard activity directory name in GCompris

pi_items.verified_value: congratulations_animation (implemented as Bonus.qml component providing visual and auditive feedback on victory)
pi_items.source: GitHub KDE/gcompris Bonus.qml source file confirms GCompris has an animation component that provides user feedback upon winning with visual and audio effects; GCompris project documentation confirms activities include congratulations screens and victory animations; search results confirm GCompris uses win voices with congratulation audio messages

privileged_info_summary: The 'Left and Right' activity (activity_name: 'leftright') is a verified GCompris educational activity where children identify whether displayed hands are left or right hands by clicking corresponding buttons. GCompris implements success feedback through its Bonus.qml component which provides visual and auditive congratulations animations when activities are completed successfully. The verifier checks for evidence of activity navigation, gameplay progression, and success state indicators such as 'Congratulations', 'Well Done', or victory animations (flowers, penguins, etc.). Data is non-synthetic, sourced from the real GCompris application installed from Ubuntu repositories.
